use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS B IN ADULT PATIENTS
TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS B IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 12 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER
TREATMENT OF CHRONIC HEPATITIS B VIRUS INFECTION IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 6 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER AND WEIGHING AT LEAST 25 KG

indications.text:
VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults with compensated liver disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].

VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults and pediatric patients 6 years of age and older and weighing at least 25 kg with
compensated liver disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].

VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults with compensated liver disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].

VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults and pediatric patients 12 years of age and older with compensated liver disease
[see Clinical Studies (14)].

VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults with compensated liver disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].

VEMLIDY is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis B virus (HBV) infection in
adults with compensated liver disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].
